/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/fishbot_interfaces/libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/fishbot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/fishbot_interfaces/srv/_fish_bot_config_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jerry/AutoSweeperSystem/AutoSweeperSystem_ws/build/fishbot_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
